error_signature: Workflow has no node to start the workflow
title: Cannot activate workflow due to missing starting node
symptom: When attempting to activate a workflow, n8n displays an error stating that there is no node to start the workflow. The activation button does not respond.
applies_when: Workflow contains no trigger, poller, or webhook node
User attempts to activate the workflow
not_this_if: Workflow has at least one valid trigger node
User is not trying to activate the workflow
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n requires at least one trigger, poller, or webhook node to initiate the workflow. If none are present, the activation process cannot proceed, leading to the error message.
fix_steps: Add a valid trigger node (e.g., webhook, poller)
Attempt to activate the duplicated workflow
agent_instruction: Duplicate the workflow and ensure at least one trigger node is present before activating.
